title: SweepArrangementAccountTypeValues
description: A sweep arrangement account is the account structure used to manage and execute the sweep logic, linking source and beneficiary accounts and controlling how funds are moved.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Source Account
x-enumeration-literals.description: Source Account used to transfer excess or required funds

x-enumeration-literals.name: Beneficiary Account
x-enumeration-literals.description: Beneficiary Account used to receive or provide funds based on sweep rules
